title: molinia arundinacea var. altissima
intro: Molinia arundinacea var. altissima, also known as tall moor-grass or giant moor-grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the grass family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Molinia arundinacea var. altissima include reducing inflammation and relieving pain, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and can be used to support immune function and overall well-being.
